title: Merge HUD + header into single command bar, add bridge badge
objective: The current sticky HUD (4 items: System/Mode/Positions/Live P&L) and header bar are two separate elements with overlapping info. Merge them into one single sticky bar with: logo, mode badge, bot dot + status, bridge badge, and right-aligned quick stats.
prerequisite: DASH_003 must be complete (same file). DASH_005 (bridge_enabled in /api/state) should be complete so the bridge badge can read a real value.
inputs: dashboard.html — .header element (lines 367-378): logo, sport badge, mode, bot dot, menu button
dashboard.html — JS that populates hud-system, hud-mode, hud-active, hud-unrlzd, bot-dot, bot-status-text, last-refresh, mode-display
deliverables: Replace .hud + .header with a single <div class='cmdbar'> sticky bar
Left: logo '⚾ Sports Bot' + MLB badge
Center-left: mode badge (conservative/neutral/aggressive colors — keep existing .mode-badge CSS)
Center: bot dot + status text + last-refresh timestamp
Center-right: bridge badge — 'BRIDGE ON' (green) if state.bridge_enabled, 'BRIDGE OFF' (red-dim) if false
Right: compact stats — 'Open: N · P&L: $X · Loop: N'
Right-end: hamburger menu button for drawer
Remove old .hud and .header elements and their associated CSS (or keep CSS if still needed by other elements)
Update all JS ID references: merge the JS that populated hud-* and header-* IDs into the new cmdbar IDs
cmdbar must be position:sticky; top:0; z-index:200
acceptance_criteria: Single sticky bar at top — no separate HUD strip and header row
Bridge badge shows BRIDGE ON (green) when bridge_enabled=true
Mode badge shows correct color for conservative/neutral/aggressive
Bot status dot still animates when live
All info from old HUD (positions count, live PnL) visible in new bar
Hamburger menu button still opens the drawer
verification: Open http://localhost:5000 — single command bar at top, no separate HUD strip
